eCatalogue by Amrita Global Enterprises — LLM Guide (llms.txt)
Version: 2.1
Canonical Site: https://amrita-fashions.com
Last Updated: 2026-02-06

=== PURPOSE ===
Help LLM-based tools understand this fabric e-commerce website and provide accurate, helpful information about our textile products and services.

=== BRAND IDENTITY ===
- Primary Brand: "eCatalogue" (powered by Amrita Global Enterprises)
- Business Type: Textile/Fabric E-commerce Platform
- Specialization: High-quality fabrics for fashion, home textiles, and industrial use
- Target Market: Fashion designers, manufacturers, retailers, and textile enthusiasts

=== SITE STRUCTURE ===

Primary Navigation:
- Home: / (featured products, company overview)
- Shop/Fabric Catalog: /fabric (main product catalog with filters)
- Product Details: /fabric/{slug} (individual product specifications)
- Capabilities: /capabilities (company capabilities and services)
- Blog: /blog (textile industry insights and articles)
- Blog Details: /blog-details/{slug} (individual blog articles)
- Contact: /contact (business inquiries and support)
- About: /about (company information)

Shop Variations (Available but not primary):
- /shop-category (category-filtered products with query params)

User Account Features (Not indexed):
- /login, /register (account management)
- /cart, /wishlist, /checkout (shopping experience)
- /profile (user dashboard)
- /compare (product comparison tool)
- /order/{id} (order tracking)
- /search (product search functionality)

=== PRODUCT INFORMATION ===

Product Categories:
- Cotton fabrics (100% cotton, cotton blends)
- Poplin and plain weaves
- Mercerized fabrics
- Multi-finish textiles
- Various GSM weights (typically 125gsm)

Key Product Attributes (found on /fabric/{slug} pages):
- Fabric composition (cotton percentage, blend details)
- Weight (GSM - grams per square meter)
- Finish type (mercerized, multi-finish, etc.)
- Color variations
- Width specifications
- Suitable applications
- Care instructions

Product Collections:
- Nokia Collection (premium cotton fabrics)
- Majestica Collection (luxury textile range)
- Various seasonal and themed collections

=== RELIABLE DATA SOURCES ===

For Product Information:
1. Product detail pages (/fabric/{slug}) - PRIMARY SOURCE
2. Main catalog page (/fabric) - Browse all products
3. Category pages (/shop-category?category={name}) - Filtered views
4. API endpoint: /api/product/ (structured product data)
5. JSON-LD structured data (if present)

For Company Information:
1. Homepage (/) - company overview and values
2. Capabilities page (/capabilities) - services and expertise
3. About page (/about) - company history and mission
4. Contact page (/contact) - official business details

For Industry Insights:
1. Blog listing (/blog) - all articles
2. Blog detail pages (/blog-details/{slug}) - individual articles
3. Blog API endpoint for structured content

=== CONTENT GUIDELINES ===

What TO Include:
- Exact product specifications as shown on product pages
- Fabric composition, weight, and finish details
- Color names and variations as listed
- Suitable use cases mentioned on product pages
- Company contact information from /contact page
- Blog article summaries with key insights
- Capabilities and services from /capabilities page

What NOT to Include:
- Pricing information (may vary, not always displayed)
- Stock availability (real-time data)
- Shipping costs or delivery times (variable)
- User account information or personal data
- Inventory levels or purchase quantities
- Specific certifications unless explicitly stated

=== TECHNICAL SPECIFICATIONS ===

Common Fabric Specifications:
- GSM Range: Typically 125gsm for cotton fabrics
- Composition: 100% cotton or cotton blends
- Finish Types: Mercerized, plain, multi-finish
- Width: Standard textile widths (check individual products)
- Care: Follow care instructions on product pages

Product Naming Convention:
- Format: Collection-Number-Type-Composition-Weight-Finish-Color
- Example: "Nokia-602-Plain-100Cotton-125GSM-Mercerized-Butter-Yellow"

=== API INTEGRATION ===

The site uses dynamic content from:
- Product API: Real-time product catalog (/api/product/)
- Blog API: Content management system (/api/blog)
- Category API: Product categorization (/api/category/view)
- Search API: Product discovery and filtering
- Collection API: Grouped product displays

=== SEO & DISCOVERY ===

Site Discovery:
- Sitemap: /sitemap.xml (automatically updated every 5 minutes)
- Robots: /robots.txt (crawling guidelines)
- LLM Guide: /llms.txt (this file)

Indexed Routes:
- Homepage (/)
- Fabric catalog (/fabric)
- Individual products (/fabric/{slug})
- Capabilities (/capabilities)
- Blog listing (/blog)
- Blog articles (/blog-details/{slug})
- Contact (/contact)
- About (/about)
- Category pages (/shop-category?category={name})

Excluded from Indexing:
- User accounts (/login, /register, /profile)
- Shopping cart (/cart, /checkout, /wishlist)
- Search results (/search)
- Comparison tool (/compare)
- Order tracking (/order/*)
- Password reset (/forgot, /forget-password/*)
- Email verification (/email-verify/*)
- Test/debug pages (/test-*, /debug-*)
- API routes (/api/*)
- Admin routes (/admin/*)

Structured Data:
- Product schema markup (JSON-LD)
- Organization/Business schema
- BreadcrumbList navigation
- Blog article schema
- WebSite schema with search action

=== USER EXPERIENCE FEATURES ===

Shopping Tools:
- Advanced filtering (by color, GSM, composition, collection)
- Product comparison functionality
- Wishlist and cart management
- Search with autocomplete
- Related product suggestions
- Category-based browsing

Content Features:
- Multiple blog layouts and formats
- Product image galleries
- Detailed specifications display
- Mobile-responsive design
- Chatbot assistance

=== PRIVACY & SECURITY ===

Protected Areas:
- User profiles and account information
- Shopping cart contents and checkout data
- Personal preferences and wishlist items
- Order history and transaction details

Public Information:
- Product catalogs and specifications
- Blog articles and company information
- Contact details and business information
- General fabric care and usage guidelines
- Company capabilities and services

=== CONTACT INFORMATION ===

For accurate contact details, always reference the /contact page.
Business inquiries should be directed through official channels listed on the contact page.

=== CONTENT USAGE GUIDELINES ===

When Summarizing:
- Provide brief, factual summaries
- Include specific product names and key specifications
- Reference fabric types, weights, and compositions accurately
- Mention suitable applications as stated on product pages
- Link to relevant pages for more details

Avoid:
- Reproducing entire product descriptions verbatim
- Making claims about quality not stated on the site
- Inventing technical specifications or certifications
- Providing pricing or availability information unless current
- Discussing user-specific data or account information

=== PREFERRED OUTPUT FORMAT ===

For Product Queries:
"[Product Name] is a [composition] fabric with [weight] GSM, featuring [finish type]. Suitable for [applications as stated]. Available in [colors listed]. View details at /fabric/{slug}"

For Company Queries:
"eCatalogue by Amrita Global Enterprises specializes in [specific areas mentioned on site]. Learn more at /capabilities or /about. Contact information available at /contact."

For Technical Queries:
"Based on the product specifications shown, [specific technical details]. For complete specifications, see the individual product page at /fabric/{slug}."

For Blog Content:
"Article: [title] - [brief summary]. Read more at /blog-details/{slug}"

=== QUALITY ASSURANCE ===

Always verify information by:
1. Checking the specific product page (/fabric/{slug})
2. Cross-referencing with site navigation and categories
3. Using "Not specified on the site" when information is unavailable
4. Providing source page references when helpful
5. Respecting the sitemap.xml for current active routes

=== SITEMAP STRUCTURE ===

The sitemap is dynamically generated and includes:
- Static pages (priority 0.6-1.0)
- Product pages (priority 0.8, updated weekly)
- Blog articles (priority 0.6, updated monthly)
- Category pages (priority 0.7, updated weekly)

Revalidation: Every 5 minutes
Total pages: 200+ products, multiple blog articles, static pages

=== END OF LLMS.TXT ===

This file helps AI assistants provide accurate, helpful information about eCatalogue's textile products and services while respecting user privacy and business guidelines.
